## Product-Specific Checks

- [ ] Real listings are only shown after discovery/detail/freshness/normalization/ranking tool outputs.
- [ ] Stale or unverified listings are labelled correctly.
- [ ] Per-person rent is distinguished from total-unit rent.
- [ ] Safety/context language is caveated and does not guarantee an area is safe.
- [ ] Missing required fields trigger follow-up questions or explicit caveats.
